# DELTA DIY MRI Travel Award Recipient Introduction

---

## NUWE BRYANT NYERO

**Affiliation:** MRI Uganda, Mbarara University of Science and Technology 

**Current role:** Undergraduate Student of Software Engineering 

**Location:** Mbarara City, Uganda 

**Workshop interests:** Image reconstruction

I am an undergradauate Software Engineering Student who has carried out research in agentic AI systems. I have an interest in deep computer vision and its applications in medical imaging. At the DELTA DIY Workshop, I'd like to learn and acquire practical skills in LFMRI, particularly image reconstruction, MR data acquisition and how to properly work with and handle the hardware. I believe, with the insights I'll gain from the various researchers and scholars, I'll be able to better contribute to low field MRI research in my institution and Sub Saharan Africa.
